Vendored browser runtime files for the offline desktop build.

- `idb/idb.umd.js`: copied from `idb@8.0.3`.
- `chartjs/chart.umd.min.js`: copied from `chart.js@4.5.1`.
- `xlsx/xlsx.full.min.js`: copied from `xlsx@0.18.5`.

These files let `index.html` run in Electron without reaching out to CDN hosts.
